sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107834" key="u(perpro/qesmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερπρόθεσμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107834.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπερήμερος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> s.h.v.</sense> </entryFree>
